## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and the reason for it.

## Testing

List the commands you ran, for example:

```bash
dotnet test Eticaret/Eticaret.WebUI.Tests/Eticaret.WebUI.Tests.csproj
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] Tests or manual verification were completed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when needed.
- [ ] SPDX headers or sidecar notices are correct for new files.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private data were introduced.

## Related Issues

Link any related issue numbers or discussions.
